S001.function: 引用信息来源，常用于写作开篇与事实陈述
examples: According to the newspaper, it’s a great movie.
According to Chinese custom, 8 is a lucky number.

S002.pattern_cn: I allowed to…? 我可以…… 吗？
S002.function: 正式场合请求许可，征求对方同意
examples: Am I allowed to smoke here?
Am I allowed to take pictures here?
Am I allowed to introduce our new manager Mr. Anderson to all of you?

S003.pattern_cn: a matter of fact … 实际上……
S003.function: 补充事实、纠正认知，引出真实情况
examples: As a matter of fact, I don’t really agree with you.
As a matter of fact, I just got back from America yesterday.

S004.pattern_cn: far as I’m concerned, … 就我而言，……
S004.function: 表达个人立场与观点，明确自身看法
examples: As far as I’m concerned, everyone should learn English.
As far as I’m concerned, I think we should pay more attention to the safety of schoolchildren.

S005.pattern_cn: far as I know, … 据我所知，……
S005.function: 限定认知范围，谨慎表达观点
examples: As far as I know, Teacher Li will come to our school tomorrow.
As far as I know, he is not coming, but I may be wrong.

S006.pattern_cn: I just mentioned, … 正如我刚才提到过的，……
S006.function: 承接前文内容，重申已提及的观点
examples: As I just mentioned, we all need to protect the earth.
As I just mentioned, nobody should drop out of school unless they believe they face the opportunity of a lifetime. And even then they should reconsider.

S007.pattern_cn: I see it, … 在我看来，……
examples: As I see it, inflation is still growing.
As I see it, he is not the right person for this position.

S008.pattern_cn: is known to us all, … 众所周知，……
S008.function: 引用普遍共识，写作开篇常用
examples: As is known to us all, Hong Kong is one of the financial centers of Asia.
As is known to us all, China has the largest population in the world.

S009.function: 引导条件状语从句，表达前提条件
examples: As long as you’re going to live here, you should really study Chinese.
As long as we work together, we can make the impossible possible.

S010.pattern_cn: for… 若不是因为……/ 如果没有……
S010.function: 虚拟语气句型，表达与事实相反的假设
examples: But for wearing his seat belt, he would have died.
But for your generous help, we couldn’t have finished the work so soon.

S051.pattern_cn: am very pleased to have this opportunity to… 我很高兴有机会……
S051.function: 正式场合开场，表达荣幸与愉悦
examples: I am very pleased to have this opportunity to stand here and give you a speech.
I am very pleased to have this opportunity to show you around Beijing.

S052.pattern_cn: apologize for… 我为…… 道歉
examples: I apologize for leaving you alone.
I apologize for keeping you waiting.

S117.function: 表达坚定的信念与观点
examples: I’m convinced that what you said is quite right.
I’m convinced that our school has the best teachers.

S165.function: 强调句子中的特定成分
examples: It was Edward who told me about it.
It is what you did that changed my mind, not your words.

S223.function: 倒装句型，表达动作紧接发生
examples: No sooner had he closed his eyes than he fell asleep.
No sooner had I fallen asleep than I heard the phone ring.

S251.pattern_cn: is no doubt that… 毫无疑问，……
S251.function: 强化确定性，引出确凿结论
examples: There is no doubt that health is better than wealth.
There is no doubt that English is an international language.

S011.pattern_cn: you believe (that)…? 你相信…… 吗？
S011.function: 引出惊叹内容，表达难以置信
examples: Can you believe that Yao Ming taught himself English?
Can you believe (that) this excellent song was composed by a high school student?

S012.pattern_cn: you imagine…? 你能想象…… 吗？
S012.function: 引导感叹内容，引发对方共情
examples: Can you imagine how much your parents love you?
Can you imagine how she lived through all these difficulties?

S013.pattern_cn: you please explain…? 你能解释一下…… 吗？
S013.function: 礼貌请求对方解释说明
examples: Could you please explain why you didn’t come to the meeting yesterday?
Could you please explain a little bit more about the Forbidden City?

S014.pattern_cn: we…? 难道我们不能…… 吗？
S014.function: 反问句型，提出建议或表达不满
examples: Can’t we walk there from here?
Can’t we just finish the work tomorrow?
Can’t we just live in today, without the worries of tomorrow or the regrets of the past?

S015.pattern_cn: you do me a favor and…? 能否请你帮我一个忙……？
S015.function: 礼貌求助，请求对方帮忙做事
examples: Could you do me a favor and lend me 10 dollars until tomorrow?
Could you do me a favor and give this present to Hilary for her birthday?

S016.pattern_cn: you by any chance know…? 你碰巧知道…… 吗？
S016.function: 委婉打听信息，语气客气自然
examples: Do you by any chance know what time the movie begins?
Do you by any chance know if this machine accepts foreign bank cards?

examples: Do you happen to know how I can get to Times Square?
Do you happen to know a good Beijing duck restaurant around here?

S019.pattern_cn: you have any good ways to…? 你有没有…… 的好办法？
examples: Do you have any good ways to improve pronunciation?

S020.pattern_cn: you know (that)…? 你知道…… 吗？
S020.function: 分享信息，引出对方可能不知道的内容
examples: Did you know (that) we are getting a foreign teacher this semester?
Did you know (that) Daniel won the first prize of the writing contest?

S021.pattern_cn: you know if/whether…? 你知不知道是否……？
S021.function: 询问不确定的信息，确认情况
examples: Do you know if there are any apartments available in this area?
Do you know if there is an English corner this weekend?

S022.pattern_cn: you mind doing…? 你介意…… 吗？
S022.function: 礼貌提出请求，征求对方同意
examples: Would you mind giving me a glass of water and some aspirin?
Do you mind speaking a little more slowly?

S023.pattern_cn: you mind if…? 如果…… 你是否介意？
S023.function: 礼貌征求许可，语气委婉客气
examples: Do you mind if I ask you a few questions?
Would you mind if we took a picture together?

S024.pattern_cn: you realize (that)…? 你有没有意识到……？
S024.function: 提醒对方注意某件事，引发重视
examples: Do you realize that everyone is counting on you?
Do you realize (that) your parents really care about you?

S025.pattern_cn: you think it is possible to…? 你认为做…… 可能吗？
S025.function: 询问对方对可能性的判断
examples: Do you think it is possible to solve the problem overnight?
Do you think it is possible for you to watch my kids? I have to go to the bathroom.

S026.pattern_cn: you think it necessary to…? 你认为有必要…… 吗？
S026.function: 询问对方对必要性的判断
examples: Do you think it necessary to ask for official permission for the event to take place?
Do you think it necessary to take an umbrella?

S027.pattern_cn: make sense. …… 没有道理 / 没有意义 / 不清楚
S027.function: 表达不认可、觉得不合理
examples: What you said doesn’t make sense. I don’t agree with you.
This bill doesn’t make sense. I was overcharged.

S028.pattern_cn: be afraid of… 不要害怕……
S028.function: 鼓励对方，消除恐惧心理
examples: Don’t be afraid of losing face and making mistakes.
Don’t be afraid of talking with foreigners.

S029.pattern_cn: take it for granted that… 别认为…… 理所当然
S029.function: 告诫对方，提醒不要想当然
examples: Don’t take it for granted that there will always be enough water for mankind.
Don’t take it for granted that your parents should support you all your life.

S030.pattern_cn: waste time doing… 不要浪费时间做……
S030.function: 提醒告诫，劝对方不要虚度时间
examples: Don’t waste time playing video games.
Don’t waste time learning a lot of useless words in isolation. The best way of learning English words is to blurt out as many authentic sentences as you can.

S031.pattern_cn: you think that…? 难道你不认为…… 吗？
S031.function: 反问引导对方认同自己的观点
examples: Don’t you think that the gap between rich and poor is getting wider?
Don’t you think that his English sounds just like a native speaker?

S032.function: 为打扰或失礼行为道歉
examples: Excuse me for interrupting, but I have something urgent to say.
Excuse me for making this phone call, but it is very important.

S033.pattern_cn: one thing, … For another, … 一方面……；另一方面……
S033.function: 分点论述理由，写作口语均常用
examples: For one thing, these shoes don’t suit you. For another, they are too expensive.
For one thing, it is too far away. For another, it is too crowded on the weekend. We’d better stay home.

S034.pattern_cn: my point of view, … 在我看来，……
examples: From my point of view, Crazy English is the most effective way to learn English.
From my point of view, America is China’s most important strategic partner.

S035.pattern_cn: where I stand, … 从我的立场来说，……
S035.function: 从自身立场出发表达观点
examples: From where I stand, we should stand by him no matter what happens.
From where I stand, pollution is the biggest challenge we face.

S036.function: 总体概括，表达普遍情况
examples: Generally speaking, Chinese students are very shy.
Generally speaking, people like to hear compliments from others.

S037.function: 倒装句型，表达两个动作紧接发生
examples: Hardly had she begun speaking when there was a knock on the door.
Hardly had we arrived when the movie started.

S038.pattern_cn: you considered doing…? 你有没有考虑过……？
S038.function: 询问对方是否考虑过某事
examples: Have you considered going abroad to study?
Have you considered starting your own business?

S039.pattern_cn: you decided… 你决定好了…… 吗？
examples: Have you decided on a major?
Have you decided where to spend your summer vacation?

S040.pattern_cn: you ever been to… 你曾经去过…… 吗？
examples: Have you ever been to Disneyland?
Have you ever been to any rural parts of China?

S041.pattern_cn: you thought about/of…? 你有没有想过……？
S041.function: 询问对方的想法与打算
examples: Have you thought of becoming an English teacher?
Have you thought about setting up your own business?

S042.pattern_cn: you heard of…? 难道你没听说过…… 吗？
S042.function: 反问确认对方是否知晓某事
examples: Haven’t you heard of Crazy English established by Li Yang?
Haven’t you heard of Liu Xiang? He is a very famous athlete in China.

S043.pattern_cn: are you getting on/along with…? …… 进展如何 / 与…… 相处如何？
S043.function: 询问事情进展或人际关系
examples: How are you getting on with swimming lessons?
How are you getting along with your business?

S044.pattern_cn: are you going to…? 你打算如何……？
S044.function: 询问对方的计划与打算
examples: How are you going to celebrate your graduation?
How are you going to prepare for the speech competition?

S045.pattern_cn: does…sound? …… 怎么样？/…… 听起来怎么样？
S045.function: 征询对方对提议的意见
examples: How does making our appointment at 8 sound?
How does taking a break and getting a drink sound?

S046.pattern_cn: long will/does it take you to…? …… 要用多长时间？
S046.function: 询问做某事需要的时长
examples: How long will it take you to memorize your speech?
How long does it take you to walk home from your office?
How long will it take you to recite such a passage?

S047.function: 征求对方建议，询问方法
examples: How should I tell him the bad news?
How should I contact you?

S048.pattern_cn: absolutely agree with … 我完全同意……
examples: Sure, I absolutely agree with your point.
I absolutely agree with this article; you should read it.
I’m grateful for your timely help.
I’m grateful for everything my parents have done for me.
I am planning to travel around China.
I am planning to attend LYCE intensive training camp this summer.
I believe that we can cure cancer totally some day.
I believe that everyone should learn a foreign language.

S054.pattern_cn: believe we should… 我认为我们应该……
examples: I believed we should work together to protect our environment.
I believe we should have a great aim in our life.
I can’t imagine what my life would be like if I were disabled.
I can’t imagine how cold it must be here in the winter.

S056.pattern_cn: can’t stand it when… 我无法忍受……
examples: I can’t stand it when I forget how to say something in English.
I can’t stand it when people talk with their mouth full.

S057.pattern_cn: didn’t expect to… 我没想到……
examples: I didn’t expect to see you here.
I didn’t expect to receive such a pretty card from him.

S058.pattern_cn: didn’t mean to… 我不是有意……
S058.function: 道歉解释，说明并非故意
examples: I didn’t mean to offend you.
I didn’t mean to keep you waiting for such a long time, I’m sorry.

S059.pattern_cn: didn’t realize… 我不知道……/ 我没意识到……
examples: I didn’t realize how much this meant to you.
I didn’t realize you spoke Chinese.

S060.function: 表达当下的意愿与想法
examples: I feel like going rock climbing with you this weekend.
I really don’t feel like going to the movies tonight.

S061.pattern_cn: don’t get very excited about… 我对…… 不怎么感兴趣
S061.function: 表达兴趣不高、不太喜欢
examples: I don’t get very excited about going to concerts.
I don’t get very excited about math class.

S062.pattern_cn: don’t know how to… 我不知道如何……
S062.function: 表达不会做某事、不知道方法
examples: I don’t know how to answer the question.
I don’t know how to say what I mean in English.

S063.pattern_cn: don’t see (that)… 我看不出……/ 我认为…… 不……
examples: I don’t see that she really intends to help us out.
I don’t see (that) anyone has a problem with our plan.

S064.pattern_cn: don’t think it is necessary to… 我认为没有必要……
S064.function: 表达对必要性的否定判断
examples: I don’t think it is necessary to leave so early.
I don’t think it is necessary to order so much food.

S065.pattern_cn: don’t think it’s right to… 我认为…… 是不对的
S065.function: 表达对行为的否定判断
examples: I don’t think it’s right to bad-mouth other people.
I don’t think it is right to use so many plastic bags.

S066.pattern_cn: doubt that/if/whether… 我怀疑 / 我不相信……
examples: I doubt if what he said is true.
I doubt if she has ever been to Hong Kong.
I dream of being a successful salesman.
I dream of speaking English as well as Li Yang.

S068.pattern_cn: dying to… 我渴望……/ 我盼望……
S068.function: 表达强烈的渴望与期盼
examples: I’m dying to improve my English.
I’m dying to leave for Beijing to meet my parents.

S069.pattern_cn: feel very honored to… 我觉得很荣幸……
S069.function: 正式场合表达荣幸，演讲常用
examples: I feel very honored to speak to you today.
I feel very honored to be a member of this team.

S070.pattern_cn: fed up with… 我厌倦了……/ 我受够了……
examples: I’m fed up with his complaining.
I’m fed up with all these traffic jams.

S071.pattern_cn: sick and tired of… 我对…… 感到厌烦
examples: I’m sick and tired of all this noise.
I’m sick and tired of the same old routine every day.

S072.pattern_cn: find it hard for me to… 我发现…… 对我来说很难
S072.function: 表达做某事有困难，it 作形式宾语
examples: I find it hard for me to study late at night.
I find it hard for me to make a speech in public.

S073.pattern_cn: hate to disagree with you, but… 我不想跟你有不同意见，但是……
S073.function: 委婉表达不同意见，语气客气
examples: I hate to disagree with you, but what you are saying isn’t correct.
I hate to disagree with you, but I think your view is impractical.

S074.pattern_cn: have confidence in… 我相信……/ 我对…… 有信心
examples: I have confidence in winning the Crazy English speech contest.
I have confidence in making it into a top university.

S075.pattern_cn: have nothing to do with… 我与…… 无关
examples: I have nothing to do with that man; I’ve never seen him before.
I have nothing to do with that problem--I just arrived.

S076.pattern_cn: have no experience in… 我在…… 方面没有经验
S076.function: 说明自己缺乏相关经验
examples: I have no experience in dealing with children.
I have no experience in talking with native speakers.

S077.pattern_cn: haven’t done…for a long time. 我很久没有…… 了
S077.function: 表达长时间未做某事的状态
examples: I haven’t played the piano for a long time.
I haven’t spoken English for a long time.

S078.function: 强硬表达要求，从句用虚拟语气
examples: I insist that you let me show you around.
I insist that you give me my money back.

S079.function: 表达坚持做某事的态度
examples: I insisted on making him our coach.
I insisted on paying for lunch.
I intend to give him a surprise.
I intend to study in America next year.

S081.pattern_cn: like nothing better than… 我喜欢…… 胜过任何东西 / 我最喜欢……
examples: I like nothing better than helping people.
I like nothing better than traveling to places I’ve never been to before.

S082.pattern_cn: never dreamed of… 我从未想过……
examples: I never dreamed of getting a perfect score.
I never dreamed of meeting you here. What a coincidence!

S083.function: 表达两者间的偏好对比
examples: I prefer playing sports to watching them on TV.
I prefer working as a manager in small company to working as a clerk in a big one.

S084.pattern_cn: prefer to…rather than… 我宁愿…… 而不愿……
S084.function: 表达选择偏好，倾向前者
examples: I prefer to send text messages rather than call.
I prefer to stay at home rather than go out.

S085.pattern_cn: really want to know… 我真的很想知道……
S085.function: 表达强烈的求知欲，询问信息
examples: I really want to know more about your country.
I really want to know how to improve my English pronunciation.

S086.pattern_cn: set my mind to do sth./on sth. 我下定决心做某事
examples: I set my mind on winning the competition.
I set my mind to believe, hope, and endure all things.

S087.pattern_cn: sincerely hope that… 我真诚地希望……
examples: I sincerely hope that our friendship will last forever.
I sincerely hope that you will take China as your second home.

S088.pattern_cn: strongly advise you to… 我强烈建议你……
examples: I strongly advise you to drink more water.
I strongly advise you to attend Crazy English Summer Camp, and I’m sure you will get more than you expected.

S089.function: 提出建议，从句用虚拟语气
examples: I suggest (that) you go there by yourself.
I suggest (that) you try some special local foods.

S090.pattern_cn: think this is a good chance for you to… 我认为这是你…… 的好机会
examples: I think this is a good chance for you to test your English.
I think this is a good chance for you to make new friends.

S091.pattern_cn: think it is a good idea to… 我认为…… 是个好主意
S091.function: 委婉提出建议，表达认可
examples: I think it is a good idea to do exercise every day.
I think it is a good idea to save all receipts.

S092.pattern_cn: think it is a waste of money/time doing… 我觉得…… 是浪费钱 / 时间
S092.function: 表达不认可，认为某事无价值
examples: I think it is a waste of time sitting in front of the television all day.
I think it is a waste of time memorizing words and grammar rules.

S093.pattern_cn: think it’s wrong to… 我认为…… 是不对的
S093.function: 表达对行为的否定判断
examples: I think it’s wrong to impose your thoughts on others.
I think it’s wrong to treat service people rudely.

S094.pattern_cn: think that it is impossible to… 我觉得…… 是不可能的
S094.function: 表达对可能性的否定判断
examples: I think that it is impossible to be there before eight.
I think that it is impossible to see everything on such a short trip.

S095.pattern_cn: think you might like to… 我想你可能会喜欢……
S095.function: 委婉推荐，推测对方喜好
examples: I think you might like to know something about my hometown.
I think you might like to hear the legend of this dish.

S096.pattern_cn: think you’d better… 我觉得你最好……
S096.function: 常用建议句型，语气委婉
examples: I think you’d better rest for a while.
I think you’d better hurry up, or you will be late.

S097.pattern_cn: want to express my gratitude to… 我要感谢……
examples: I want to express my gratitude to my family for their support.
I want to express my gratitude to my teacher for her guidance and patience.

S098.pattern_cn: was impressed by… 我被…… 打动了 /…… 给我留下了深刻印象
examples: I was impressed by his inspiring words, and I decided to cooperate with him.
I was deeply impressed by the athletes’ dedication.

S099.pattern_cn: wonder/was wondering if… 我在想是否……
examples: I wonder if I could take this dictionary home.
I was wondering if you’d like to go to a concert tomorrow night.

S100.function: 强硬表达要求，从句用虚拟语气
examples: I demanded (that) I see the principal right away.
I demanded (that) he pick up the litter he had thrown on the ground.

S101.pattern_cn: won’t … unless … 除非…… 否则我不会……
S101.function: unless 引导条件状语从句，表达前提条件
examples: I won’t write to him unless he writes to me first.
I won’t leave unless you give me a reason.

S102.function: 表达过去的习惯或状态，现在已改变
examples: I used to go to play basketball with some of my friends every Saturday afternoon.
I used to be afraid of speaking English.

S103.pattern_cn: would advise you to… 我想建议你……
examples: I would advise you to book tickets in advance.
I would advise you to get up earlier on Mondays, because there’s always a traffic jam.

S104.pattern_cn: would appreciate it if … 如果……，我会非常感激
examples: I would appreciate it if you call me back this evening.
I would appreciate it if you would write a few words for me.

S105.pattern_cn: would like to recommend… 我想推荐……
examples: I would like to recommend the noodles here. They are excellent.
I would like to recommend a trip to Jiuzhaigou.

S106.pattern_cn: would like to…rather than… 我宁愿…… 也不愿……
examples: I would like to take a walk rather than watch TV this weekend.
I would like to chat in person rather than chat on line.

S107.pattern_cn: would rather…than… 我宁愿……，而不愿……
S107.function: 表达意愿上的偏好选择
examples: I would rather eat local food than fast food.
I would rather stay at home than go shopping on such humid day.

S108.pattern_cn: wouldn’t feel happy if… 如果…… 我会不高兴的
S108.function: 表达对某事的不满倾向
examples: I wouldn’t feel happy if you didn’t come to my birthday party.
I wouldn’t feel happy if I felt you weren’t comfortable.

S109.pattern_cn: be happy to…, if you’d like. 如果你愿意，我很高兴……
examples: I’d be happy to show you around, if you’d like.
I’d be happy to translate for you, if you’d like.

S110.pattern_cn: like to know more about… 我想了解更多关于……
S110.function: 表达想要了解更多信息
examples: I’d like to know more about the project you are carrying out.
I’d like to know more about how you learned English.

S111.pattern_cn: like to suggest you do… 我想建议你……
examples: I’d like to suggest you take the test when you are still in school.
I’d like to suggest you visit our school again soon.

S112.pattern_cn: like/love to, but… 我很想，但……
examples: I’d love to, but I’m afraid I’m otherwise engaged.
I’d love to, but sadly, I am leaving tomorrow.

S113.function: 表达确定或不确定的态度
examples: I’m certain that you will get over your laziness.
I’m not certain whether this address is correct.

S114.pattern_cn: afraid I won’t be able to… 恐怕我不能……
S114.function: 委婉表达无法做到某事
examples: I’m afraid I won’t be able to finish the task before Friday.
I’m afraid I won’t be able to keep our appointment.
Don’t bother me -- I’m busy with my project right now.
Don’t bother me -- I am busy writing my composition.
I’m considering buying a second-hand computer because I’m short of money now.
I’m considering paying a visit to Beijing next month.

S118.pattern_cn: curious to do… 我对做…… 很好奇
examples: I’m curious to know what was happening outside.
I’m curious to know more about American holidays.
I’m determined to read 10 books this month.
I’m determined to practice English every morning when I wake up.

S120.pattern_cn: interested in… 我对…… 感兴趣
examples: I’m interested in joining the English corner.
I’m interested in learning more about your country.

S121.pattern_cn: interested in… 我对…… 感兴趣
S121.function: 表达兴趣与喜好（原文重复收录，强化记忆）
examples: I’m interested in joining the English corner.
I’m interested in learning more about your country.

S122.pattern_cn: (just) calling to… 我打电话来是要……
S122.function: 电话用语，说明来电目的
examples: I am just calling to confirm my flight number.
I am (just) calling to see how you are feeling.

S123.function: 表达确定或不确定的态度
examples: I’m not sure if I should accept that job offer in Hong Kong.
I’m not sure if I want to go abroad to study.

S124.pattern_cn: not very interested in… 我对…… 不是很感兴趣
examples: I’m not very interested in Korean TV shows.
I’m not very interested in listening to classical music.

S125.pattern_cn: occupied in doing/with… 我正忙于……
examples: I’m occupied in preparing for the final exams; don’t bother me!
I’m occupied with volunteer work. I’m an Olympic volunteer.

S126.pattern_cn: really fond of… 我很喜欢……
examples: I’m really fond of surfing the Internet; it is pretty convenient.
I’m really fond of classical music because it can calm me down.

S127.pattern_cn: really/terribly/extremely sorry for… 我对…… 感到非常抱歉
examples: I’m really sorry for the delay of the report.
I’m really sorry for what happened.

S128.pattern_cn: been thinking about… 我一直想……
S128.function: 现在完成进行时，表达持续的想法
examples: I’ve been thinking about going to France to study art.
I’ve been thinking about going to your intensive training camp.

S129.pattern_cn: have a desire to… 我非常渴望……
examples: I have a strong desire to speak good English.
I have a desire to hike the Great Wall.
I’ve decided to join a health club.
I’ve decided to run for the monitor of our class.

S131.pattern_cn: I did…, I would… 如果我……，我会……
S131.function: 虚拟条件句，对现在的虚拟
examples: If I knew his number, I would phone him.
If I had enough money, I would buy an MP3 player.

S132.pattern_cn: I had done…, I would have done… 如果我……，我就会……
S132.function: 虚拟条件句，对过去的虚拟
examples: If I had known that you were coming, I would have met you at the airport.
If I had seen the accident, I would have stopped to help.

S133.pattern_cn: I were you, I would… 如果我是你，我就会……
S133.function: 经典建议句型，虚拟语气
examples: If I were you, I would get rid of this bad habit.
If I were you, I would take a bottle of water with me.

S134.pattern_cn: only… 真希望……/ 若是…… 该多好啊
S134.function: 虚拟语气，表达强烈愿望
examples: If only she would accept my invitation.
If only we could get a ticket!

S135.pattern_cn: it is possible, … 可能的话……
S135.function: 提出假设性的请求或建议
examples: If it is possible, I’d like to visit your company.
If it is possible, lend me your car tonight.

S136.pattern_cn: you ask me, I think… 如果你问我，我认为……
examples: If you ask me, I think you should practice more.
If you ask me, I think pollution is China’s biggest problem.

S137.pattern_cn: you want to…, you’ll have to… 如果你想……；你就得……
S137.function: 条件状语从句，说明必要条件
examples: If you want to remember more words, you’ll have to read a lot in English.
If you want to lose weight, you’ll have to eat less and exercise more.
In a word, money is something but not everything.
What matters most in life? In a word, health.
In brief, we cannot please everyone all the time.
In short, science frees us from the bondage of nature. It has made our lives easier and more comfortable.

S140.function: 写作演讲结尾总结，引出最终结论
examples: In conclusion, I find mutual understanding plays a key role in building a friendly relationship.
In conclusion, we must work together to improve our performance.

S141.function: 概括普遍情况，表达一般性结论
examples: In general, graduates who speak good English will have more chances than those who don’t.
In general, the food here is very light and fresh.
In my opinion, we should never abandon hope for success.
In my opinion, exams create a lot of stress.

S143.pattern_cn: order to…, you should… 为了……，你应该……
examples: In order to understand this essay fully, you should read more about its author.
In order to score well in exams, you should study every day and not wait until the last minute.

S144.function: 换一种表述解释前文内容
examples: In other words, you should read and speak English crazily every day.
In other words, there are no shortcuts to success.

S145.function: 承接前文条件，引出对应结论
examples: In that case, I have nothing to say.
The weather forecast calls for rain tomorrow. In that case, we will meet indoors.
If you want to succeed in life, I think to set a goal for yourself is of great importance.
Communication skills are of great importance in today’s job market.

S147.pattern_cn: it convenient for you to…? 你是否方便……？
S147.function: 礼貌询问对方是否方便做某事
examples: Is it convenient for you to post this letter for me when you go out?
Is it convenient for you to read my essay this afternoon?
Is it OK if I borrow your notebook tonight?
Is it OK if I ask you a few questions?

S149.pattern_cn: it possible to…? 可以…… 吗？
examples: Is it possible to exchange the milk shake for the ice cream?
Is it possible to exchange this shirt for a larger size?

S150.pattern_cn: there a better way to…? …… 有没有更好的方法？
examples: Is there a better way to search for images on the Internet?
Is there a better way to send these books to my friend in Canada?
Is there a better way to improve my pronunciation?

S151.pattern_cn: there any chance you could possibly…? 你有没有可能……？
examples: Is there any chance you could possibly come to China?
Is there any chance you could possibly change your schedule?

S152.pattern_cn: there anything else that…? 还有别的…… 吗？
S152.function: 追问是否还有其他内容
examples: Is there anything else that you don’t understand?
Is there anything else that I can do for you?

S153.pattern_cn: appears that… 看来……/ 似乎……
S153.function: 表达观察到的迹象与推测
examples: It appears that the air is much cleaner this year.
It appears that great progress has been made in the IT industry.

S154.pattern_cn: depends on whether… 这取决于…… 是否……
S154.function: 说明事情取决于某一条件
examples: It depends on whether you are determined to do it or not.
It depends on whether I do well on my exam or not.

S155.pattern_cn: doesn’t make sense to… …… 没有任何意义
S155.function: 表达某事不合理、无价值
examples: It doesn’t make sense to argue with him.
It doesn’t make sense to spend so much money.

S156.pattern_cn: doesn’t matter whether/if… …… 没关系 /…… 无所谓
S156.function: 说明某事不重要、不影响结果
examples: It doesn’t matter if you have made mistakes. Learn from your mistakes and you’ll make progress.
It doesn’t matter whether you go to a famous university or not.

S157.pattern_cn: goes without saying that… …… 理应如此 / 不言而喻
examples: It goes without saying that China needs more English speakers.
It goes without saying that women should have equal rights and opportunities with men.

S158.pattern_cn: makes a/no difference (to sb.)… （对某人来说）…… 很重要 / 无所谓
examples: It makes no difference to me whether you go or not.
It makes no difference whether we speak English or Chinese, both are OK.

S159.pattern_cn: occurred to me that… …… 浮现于我的脑海中 / 我想起……
examples: It suddenly occurred to me that I knew how to solve that problem.
It occurred to me that we met during the Spring Festival several years ago.

S160.pattern_cn: won’t do any harm to… …… 没有坏处
S160.function: 劝对方尝试某事，说明无害
examples: It won’t do any harm to try it.
It won’t do any harm to practice a little more.

S161.pattern_cn: would be wonderful if… 要是…… 那就太好了
examples: It would be wonderful if we could go visit Mount Emei this summer!
It would be wonderful if we stayed in touch by email.
It happened that I won football lottery last week.
It happened that I ran into my English teacher at the supermarket.

S163.pattern_cn: helps if… 如果…… 的话，将会（对某人）有帮助 / 好处
S163.function: 说明什么做法会有帮助
examples: It helps if you can conquer your shyness and yell English out crazily.
It helps if you take a long deep breath when you feel nervous.
It’s amazing (that) China became the third country that launched a manned spacecraft.
It’s amazing that he didn’t hurt himself in the traffic accident.

S166.pattern_cn: is bad to… …… 是不好的
S166.function: 评价某事是不好的、有害的
examples: It is bad to push yourself too hard. Just try your best.
It is bad to drink Coke and soft drinks instead of water.

S167.pattern_cn: hard to imagine… 很难想象……
examples: It’s hard to imagine how he made it without any help.
It’s hard to imagine how much China has changed.

S168.pattern_cn: is believed that… 人们认为……
S168.function: 表达普遍的看法与认知
examples: It is believed that what she said is true.
It is believed that many important things were invented in China.

S169.pattern_cn: didn’t/won’t take long before… 没多久 / 不需要多久…… 就……
S169.function: 表达某事很快就会发生
examples: It didn’t take long before he got used to life abroad.
It won’t take long before you can find your way around campus.

S170.pattern_cn: is easier to…than to… …… 比…… 容易
S170.function: 比较两件事的难易程度
examples: It is easier to buy a car than to keep one.
It is easier to read English than to speak English.

S171.pattern_cn: is easy enough to… …… 相当容易
S171.function: 说明某事做起来很容易
examples: It is easy enough to copy and paste, but you should write something by yourself.
It is easy enough to criticize, but we should try to find solutions.

S172.function: 强调某事至关重要，从句用虚拟语气
examples: It is essential that you finish all of the medicine.
It is essential that effective measures be taken to protect our civil rights.

S173.pattern_cn: is good manners to do… …… 是有礼貌的表现
examples: It is good manners to bring along a small gift or some flowers when you are invited to dinner by a foreign friend.
It is good manners to hold the door for others.

S174.pattern_cn: is high time (that)… 现在是…… 时候了 / 早就应该…… 了
S174.function: 敦促做某事，从句用虚拟语气（一般过去时）
examples: It is high time we stopped talking about this silly question.
It is high time that we changed this useless rule!
It is hoped that no one was seriously injured in the car crash.
It is hoped that every student can attend the program.

S176.pattern_cn: is important that… …… 是很重要的
S176.function: 强调重要性，从句用虚拟语气
examples: It is important that something be done before it’s too late.
It is important that you get enough sleep the night before your exam.

S177.pattern_cn: long been my dream to… …… 一直是我的梦想
examples: It’s long been my dream to make a speech in English.
It’s long been my dream to attend Harvard University.

S178.pattern_cn: is (very/not) likely that… （很 / 没）有可能……
examples: It is very likely that it will rain this afternoon.
It is not likely that they will give up the game.

S179.pattern_cn: is (not) necessary to… …… 是（没）有必要的
examples: I think it is necessary to look before you leap.
When invited, it is not necessary for you to bring anything with you.

S180.pattern_cn: is no use doing sth. 做某事是毫无用处的
S180.function: 说明做某事没有用、无意义
examples: It is no use talking without doing.
It is no use blaming each other when the problem already exists.

S181.pattern_cn: is not unusual for sb. to do… 某人做…… 不足为奇
S181.function: 说明某事很常见、很正常
examples: It is not unusual for the British people to drink tea.
It is not unusual for employees to work overtime.

S182.pattern_cn: is possible/impossible to… …… 是（不）可能的
examples: It is possible for him to finish it in five days.
It’s impossible to predict the outcome of the game.

S183.pattern_cn: is dangerous to… …… 是危险的
examples: It is dangerous to explore a jungle alive with wild animals.
It is dangerous to post your personal information on the Internet.

S184.pattern_cn: is (rather) common to do… ……（相当）普遍
examples: It is rather common to see grandparents caring for small children.
It is rather common for women to hold important positions in companies now.

S185.function: 引用报道内容，写作常用
examples: It is reported that the world famous football star will come to China next year.
It is reported that the economy will grow by 9 percent this year.

S186.function: 说明规定要求，从句用虚拟语气
examples: It is required that all members of the club speak English.
It is required that every student (should) attend the meeting this afternoon.

S187.function: 引用传闻，口语写作常用
examples: It is said that Liu Xiang will come to our city soon.
It is said that Li Yang translated for many famous people.

S188.pattern_cn: is thought that… 人们认为……
S188.function: 表达普遍的看法与观点
examples: It is thought that girls have more language ability than boys.
It is thought that man’s ability to learn languages makes him different from the animals.
It is true that city life is much more exciting than country life.
It is true that boys cannot speak English as well as girls.
It is very difficult to avoid traffic jams during rush hours.
It is very difficult to foretell what the world will be like in the future.

S191.pattern_cn: really a challenge for me to… …… 对我来说确实是一个挑战
examples: It’s really a challenge for me to speak in public because I am very shy.
It’s really a challenge for me to take this job, and I think I will appreciate working with you.

S192.function: 说明某事很有用、有价值
examples: It is very useful to recite English sentences and passages.
It is very useful to take a deep breath when you feel nervous.
It is obvious that she is terribly nervous on stage.
It was clear that he didn’t want me to join them.

S194.pattern_cn: seems/seemed that… 好像……/ 似乎……
examples: It seemed that no one knew what had happened.
It seems that you don’t know anyone here.
It sounds like a good idea.
It sounds like you have a great future ahead of you.

S196.pattern_cn: takes/took/will take sb. some time to do sth. 某人花多长时间做某事
S196.function: 说明做某事花费的时间
examples: It took me years of hard work to speak good English.
It takes my father an hour to go to work every day.
It wasn’t until yesterday that I got your letter.
It wasn’t until last week that I found out my exam score.

S198.pattern_cn: is not/just like sb. to do sth. …… 的行为不像 / 正像某人的为人
S198.function: 评价行为是否符合某人一贯作风
examples: It’s not like her father to lose his temper; he is very patient.
It’s not like Jim to be late for class. He regards time as the most important thing in life.

S199.pattern_cn: is a bad habit to… …… 是一个坏习惯
examples: It’s a bad habit to put off things until the last minute.
It’s a bad habit to eat too much junk food.

S200.pattern_cn: is a great pleasure to… ……（感到）非常愉快
examples: It’s a great pleasure to do business with you.
It’s a great pleasure to welcome you to our school.

S201.pattern_cn: is customary to… …… 是一种习俗
examples: It’s customary to give people gifts on their birthday.
It’s customary to give lucky money to children in Spring Festival.

S202.pattern_cn: is delightful to… …… 令人很愉快
examples: It’s delightful to play by the seashore.
It is delightful to meet people from so many different countries.

S203.pattern_cn: is my great honor to… …… 是我莫大的荣幸
S203.function: 正式演讲场合表达荣幸
examples: It’s my great honor to be here today.
It’s my great honor to present the governor.

S204.pattern_cn: is (not) good to… …… 是（不）好的
examples: It’s not good to get into the habit of telling lies.
It’s not good to sleep right after eating a big meal.

S205.pattern_cn: is our duty to… …… 是我们的责任
examples: It’s our duty to learn as much as we can!
It’s our duty to protect the forests from destruction.

S206.pattern_cn: is wrong to… …… 是不对的
S206.function: 明确指出某行为是错误的
examples: It’s wrong to cheat on exams!
It’s wrong to read people’s private letters without permission.

S207.pattern_cn: a shame/pity that… 可惜 / 遗憾……
examples: It’s a shame that you can’t stay a little longer.
It’s a shame that you cannot make it to the party.

S208.pattern_cn: is (really) unbelievable that… ……（真）让人难以置信
S208.function: 表达极度惊讶与难以置信
examples: It’s really unbelievable that such an honest man could betray his friends!
It’s really unbelievable that five students from my class will attend Beijing University.
It is difficult to arrive there on time in such bad weather.
I think it will be difficult to tell her the truth.

S210.pattern_cn: do you good to… …… 对你有好处
examples: I think it’ll do you good to get some fresh air.
I think it’ll do you good to drink eight glasses of water everyday.

S211.pattern_cn: but not least, … 最后但同样重要的是，……
S211.function: 分点论述收尾，演讲写作常用
examples: Last but not least, I’d love to thank all my teachers and friends.
Last but not least, I want to present the award for the best English speaker.

S212.pattern_cn: me explain why… 让我解释为什么……
examples: Let me explain why I am so late.
Let me explain why I didn’t do my homework.

S213.pattern_cn: me fill you in on… 让我来告诉你……
S213.function: 告知对方详细信息，口语地道表达
examples: Let me fill you in on the company’s new policies.
Let me fill you in on what we did in class yesterday.

S214.pattern_cn: let me know if… 如果……，请告诉我
examples: Let me know if you change your mind.
(Just) let me know if you don’t know how to get to that shop. I will be glad to take you there.

S215.pattern_cn: me see if… 让我看看是否……
examples: Let me see if I can be of any help.
Let me see if I can explain this Chinese idiom in English.

S216.pattern_cn: sure to do sth. 一定要做某事……
examples: Make sure to leave a note if you go out.
Make sure to turn off the computer when you finish your work.

S217.pattern_cn: it’s better to… 也许…… 会更好
examples: Maybe it’s better to stay at the hospital for another few days.
Maybe it’s better to send a text message instead of calling.

S218.pattern_cn: a great deal to… …… 对…… 意义重大
examples: Your encouragement means a great deal to me.
This dictionary means a great deal to me because I won it in a speech competition.

S219.pattern_cn: dream/goal/hope/plan is to… 我的梦想 / 目标 / 希望 / 计划是……
S219.function: 明确说明自己的梦想、目标或计划
examples: My dream is to become a doctor and find a cure for cancer.
My goal is to speak fluent English in three months.

S220.pattern_cn: point of view is that… 我的观点是……
examples: My point of view is that everybody should have the right to get education.
My point of view is that nothing in the world is more important than family.
No matter what happens, I’ll always stand by you.
No matter what happens, your parents love you very much.

S222.pattern_cn: one can deny that… 没有人能够否认……
S222.function: 强化观点，引出无可辩驳的事实
examples: No one can deny that the accident was caused by carelessness.
No one can deny that the 2008 Olympics were a great success.

S224.pattern_cn: words can express… 语言难以表达……/…… 难以言表
examples: No words can express how thankful I am for your help.
No words can express how surprised and happy I was when I saw the gift.
Not until we got home did we notice how late it was.
Not until I began to work did I realize how much time I had wasted.
Now that you are alone, we can talk freely.
Now that you have already made up your mind, I’m not going to say anything.
I will help you, on the condition that you finish your assignment first.
I will lend it to you on the condition that you return it in a week.

S228.function: 转折对比，引出相反情况
examples: Their criticism did not discourage me. On the contrary, I worked even harder.
Most Americans do not like pale skin, on the contrary, they are fond of dark skin.

S229.pattern_cn: (the) one hand…, on the other (hand), … 一方面……，另一方面……
S229.function: 分点对比论述，写作常用
examples: On (the) one hand I admire your ability, but on the other (hand) I distrust your judgment.
On (the) one hand I want to be a teacher, on the other (hand) I worry about making money.

S230.pattern_cn: of the + 形容词最高级 + 名词 (短语) is… 最…… 之一的就是……
S230.function: 最高级表达，列举典型事物
examples: One of the most impressive pieces of writing is Hamlet.
One of the most impressive sights in the world is the Great Wall.
Personally, I think a lot of Chinese food is too oily and salty.
Personally, I believe that women play an increasingly important part in society now.

S232.function: 礼貌邀请对方随时做某事
examples: Please don’t hesitate to call me anytime you are in town.
Please don’t hesitate to contact us if you are in need of assistance.

S233.function: 礼貌告知对方不必拘束
examples: Please feel free to visit me when you are in Guangzhou.
Please feel free to call me by my English name, if it is easier for you to remember.

S234.pattern_cn: forgive me for… 请原谅我……
examples: Please forgive me for being late.
Please forgive me for forgetting your name.

S235.pattern_cn: give my best wishes to… 请代我问候……
examples: Please give my best wishes to your parents.
Please give my best wishes to your whole family.

S236.pattern_cn: studies show that… 最近研究表明……
S236.function: 引用研究结论，写作常用
examples: Recent studies show that an increasing number of students go abroad at an early age.
Recent studies show that spending too much time indoors can cause myopia.

S237.pattern_cn: can do nothing but do… 除了做……，某人什么也做不了
S237.function: 表达别无选择、只能做某事
examples: Their neighbours can do nothing but envy their new pool.
I can do nothing but wait for my father’s return.

S238.pattern_cn: have/has/had no choice but to do… 某人除了做…… 别无选择
examples: We had no choice but to cancel our trip.
We had no choice but to take a taxi for we’d missed the last bus.

S239.pattern_cn: look (s) as if… 某人看上去好像……
examples: She looks as if she has a cold, unfriendly manner.
He looks as if he likes his job very much.

S240.pattern_cn: must be done to… 必须采取措施……
S240.function: 提出必须采取行动，包含被动语态
examples: Something must be done to change our current examination system.
Something must be done to reduce pollution.

S241.pattern_cn: to bother you, but… 很抱歉打扰你，可是……
S241.function: 打扰对方前的礼貌铺垫
examples: Sorry to bother you, but I have a question to ask you.
Sorry to bother you, but the meeting is about to begin.

S242.function: 说明原因，带有感激意味
examples: Thanks to his parents’ encouragement and support, he finally realized his dream.
Thanks to Li Yang Crazy English, I became the top student in my class.

S243.pattern_cn: point is (that)… 重点 / 关键是……
examples: The point is that you have to keep your promise to help her with her English.
The point is we should not waste our precious time.
The problem now is that we’re locked out of the house.
The question is whether they will be able to help us.

S245.pattern_cn: reason why… is… …… 的原因是……
examples: The reason why he made such a great achievement is his perseverance.
The reason why I am here is that I want to meet other Crazy English learners.

S246.pattern_cn: secret of… is to… …… 的秘诀是……
S246.function: 揭示成功或做事的秘诀
examples: The secret of success is to do the common things uncommonly well.
The secret of speaking English well is to practice constantly.

S247.pattern_cn: way I see it, … 我的看法是……
examples: The way I see it, you should avoid making the same mistake again.
The way I see it, we are likely wasting our time.

S248.pattern_cn: was the moment when… 就是那个时候……
S248.function: 描述关键时刻，when 引导定语从句
examples: This was the moment when I realized that I wanted to be a professional singer.
This was the moment when I felt all my hard work had finally paid off.

S249.pattern_cn: reminds me, … 那提醒了我……/ 那让我想起了……
S249.function: 话题衔接，引出想起的事情
examples: That reminds me, I must get some cash.
That reminds me, I need to make an appointment with the dentist.

S250.pattern_cn: are signs that… 有迹象表明 / 显示……
examples: There are signs that you have made a significant improvement.
There are signs that the tourism industry is growing.

S252.pattern_cn: seems to be… 看起来好像有……
examples: There seems to be a little misunderstanding between them.
There seems to be something wrong with my computer.

S253.pattern_cn: used to be… 过去曾有……/ 曾经有过……
S253.function: 描述过去存在、现在已没有的事物
examples: There used to be many forests in our country.
There used to be some shabby buildings here.

S254.pattern_cn: no point in… …… 是无用的 / 无意义的
examples: There’s no point in getting angry when things have happened.
There is no point in being upset about it now, you can’t change the past.
There’s no way one could succeed without hard work.
There is no way you can master English without practice.

S256.pattern_cn: a great/some extent, … 在很大 / 某种程度上，……
examples: To a great extent, you will be on your own.
To some extent, from self-confidence comes success and from success comes more self-confidence.

S257.pattern_cn: be frank/honest, … 老实说，……/ 说实话，……
examples: To be honest, I don’t think we have a chance of winning.
To be honest, I didn’t like the show.

S258.pattern_cn: one’s delight/joy/surprise, … 让某人高兴 / 惊奇的是，……
examples: To my delight, there’s a sale on clothes on Beijing Road.
To my surprise, I got a new computer for my birthday.

S259.function: 分点论述开头，引出第一点
examples: To start with, let’s talk about how much money we need.
To start with, we have to make a schedule.

S260.pattern_cn: sum up… 总之，……/ 总而言之，……
examples: To sum up, life in the future will certainly be very different from that of today.
To sum up, we must all work together.
To tell you the truth, I used to make a lot of trouble when I was young.
To tell you the truth, I am not a very good student.

S262.pattern_cn: hold the opinion that… 我们认为……
examples: We hold the opinion that miracles sometimes occur, but one has to work terribly hard for them.
We hold the opinion that all cultures are very important.

S263.pattern_cn: must do something to… 我们必须采取行动……
examples: We must do something to reduce the pollution.
We must do something to show our appreciation to our teacher.

S264.pattern_cn: must take action/measures to… 我们必须采取行动……
examples: We must take action to keep up with new developments.
We must take measures to fight against pollution.

S265.pattern_cn: should make every effort to… 我们应该尽全力……
examples: We should make every effort to protect our valuable drinking water.
We should make every effort to promote Chinese culture around the world.

S266.pattern_cn: do you find the hardest in…? 你觉得…… 最大的困难是什么？
S266.function: 询问对方认为的最大难点
examples: What do you find the hardest in learning English?
What do you find the hardest in university life?

S267.pattern_cn: do you mean by…? 你…… 是什么意思？
examples: What do you mean by telling me a lie?
What do you mean by borrowing my book without asking my permission?

S268.pattern_cn: do you say…? 你认为…… 怎么样？
examples: What do you say we go for a drive one of these days when it clears up?
What do you say I cook you dinner tonight?

S269.pattern_cn: do you think of…? 你认为…… 怎么样？
S269.function: 询问对方对某事的看法
examples: What do you think of the relationship between China and Japan?
What do you think of the Japanese food?

S270.pattern_cn: I’m getting at is… 我的意思是……
S270.function: 澄清自己真正想表达的意思
examples: What I’m getting at is that he deserves this promotion.
What I’m getting at is all our teachers work very hard.

S271.pattern_cn: is more serious is that… 更严重的是……
S271.function: 递进引出更严重的问题
examples: What is more serious is that you didn’t realize your mistakes.
What is more serious is that you are risking your health by not resting.

S272.pattern_cn: the point of…? …… 意义何在？/ 为什么要……？
S272.function: 质疑某事的意义与价值
examples: What’s the point of arguing about it?
What’s the point of wasting so much time eating?

S273.pattern_cn: makes you think…? 是什么让你认为……？/ 你为什么认为……？
examples: What makes you think he will show up?
What makes you think she is German?

S274.pattern_cn: seems to be the problem with…? …… 大概出了什么问题？
S274.function: 询问事物出了什么问题
examples: What seems to be the problem with the computer? It doesn’t work smoothly.
What seems to be the problem with your phone? It can’t dial any numbers outside Beijing properly.

S275.pattern_cn: seems to be the trouble is… 好像问题在于……
examples: What seems to be the trouble is that some women still don’t have the same rights as men do in many respects.
What seems to be the trouble is there aren’t enough jobs.

S276.pattern_cn: surprised me is that… 令我吃惊的是……
examples: What surprised me is that everybody seemed to be very indifferent to her.
What surprised me is that he knew so much about Chinese history.

S277.pattern_cn: will you do if…? 如果……，你会做什么？
S277.function: 询问假设情况下的做法
examples: What will you do if such kind of thing happens to you?
What will you do if you win the scholarship?

S278.pattern_cn: you have to do is… 你必须做的是……
examples: What you have to do is to hand in your composition tomorrow.
What you have to do is to apologize to him.

S279.pattern_cn: would you say…? 你认为…… 怎么样？
S279.function: 征询对方对假设情况的看法
examples: What would you say if the project would have to be postponed?
What would you say if I told you I wanted to move to another city?

S280.pattern_cn: do you want me to…? 你想让我在什么时候……？
examples: When do you want me to fulfill this project?
When do you want me to call you tomorrow?

S281.pattern_cn: it comes to… 谈到……/ 涉及到……
S281.function: 话题衔接，转入某一特定话题
examples: When it comes to English, he’s an expert.
When it comes to talking to people, he is helplessly shy.

S282.pattern_cn: will it be convenient for you to…? 你看什么时候方便……？
S282.function: 礼貌询问对方方便的时间
examples: When will it be convenient for you to come to my home?
When will it be convenient for you to read my composition?

S283.pattern_cn: you be so kind as to…? 能否请你帮我……？
examples: Would you be so kind as to get our board and lodging ready?
Would you be so kind as to get our room?

S284.pattern_cn: you like to…? 你想…… 吗？
examples: Would you like to join us? We’re sure you’ll have a good time.
Would you like to try this hot pot restaurant?

S285.pattern_cn: are bound to… if… 如果…… 你一定会……
S285.function: 表达条件下的必然结果
examples: You are bound to win if you are determined to win.
You are bound to succeed if you work hard and stick to your goal.

S286.pattern_cn: are expected to… 你要 / 应该……
examples: You are expected to work late tonight.
You are expected to bring all the necessary documents.
You are not allowed to use my computer when I’m away.
You are not allowed to eat or drink on the subway.
You are not permitted to park your car here.
You are not permitted to begin the exam until the teacher tells you to start.
You are required to show the ticket.
You are required to fill out this form if you want a refund.

S290.function: 说明应尽的义务与常理要求
examples: You are supposed to have finished reading this novel by now.
You are supposed to take this medicine three times a day.

S291.pattern_cn: don’t have to… 你没必要 / 不必……
examples: You don’t have to be present.
You don’t have to thank me, it was my pleasure to help.

S292.pattern_cn: don’t need to… 你没必要……
examples: You don’t need to do all that was required of us.
You don’t need to wait for me.

S293.pattern_cn: really have to do something about… 你的确应该处理一下……/ 你真的得为…… 做点什么了
S293.function: 敦促对方采取行动解决问题
examples: You really have to do something about your poor pronunciation.
You really have to do something about your weight. It is not healthy to be so heavy.

S294.pattern_cn: should avoid doing sth. 你应该避免……
examples: You should avoid being late for school.
You should avoid breathing second-hand smoke.

S295.pattern_cn: should make an effort to… 你应该努力……
examples: You should make an effort to improve your reading comprehension.
You should make an effort to understand your parents better.

S296.pattern_cn: should make good use of… 你应该充分利用……
S296.function: 建议对方充分利用资源
examples: You should make good use of your spare time to practice English.
You should make good use of every opportunity to improve yourself.

S297.pattern_cn: should never… 你永远都不应该……
S297.function: 强烈告诫对方不要做某事
examples: You should never hesitate. What is needed is your firm action.
You should never even try smoking.

S298.pattern_cn: were (not) supposed to… 你本（不）应该……
S298.function: 评价过去本该做却没做的事
examples: Jim, you were supposed to call three hours ago!
You were not supposed to leave until the program was over.

S299.pattern_cn: will be able to…if… 如果……，你将能够……
S299.function: 说明条件达成后可以做到某事
examples: You will be able to get accepted by a top law school if you can pass the exam.
You will be able to improve quickly if you practice more every day.

S300.pattern_cn: never guess… 你永远猜不到……
S300.function: 引出惊喜内容，制造悬念
examples: You’ll never guess who telephoned me just now — my cousin from America.
You will never guess how old she is.
